utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Chandler ! ! You have the best taste in men !

emotion_cause.span: 1_You have the best taste in men !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Patrick and I had such a great time last night ! I mean I think this could maybe turn into something serious .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Patrick and I had such a great time last night ! I mean I think this could maybe turn into something serious .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Really ? ! I ... I thought you were not looking for something serious ? I thought you were looking for some kind of a fling .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I think this could maybe turn into something serious .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , you know , possibly . You did not tell him that , though ? Right ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You told this guy that I was looking for a fling ? ! You do not tell the guy that !

emotion_cause.span: 7_You told this guy that I was looking for a fling ? !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , between you telling him that I wanted to have a fling and me putting out on the first date ... oh , he is so gonna get the wrong idea .

emotion_cause.span: 8_you telling him that I wanted to have a fling and me putting out on the first date ... oh , he is so gonna get the wrong idea .
